message:
test(golden): follow upstream API moves in toon_rust + workflows re-exports

golden_pane_state_toon.rs
  - toon_rust::cli::json_stringify::json_stringify_lines now takes a
    toon_rust::JsonValue, not a serde_json::Value. Wrap via
    JsonValue::from(json_value.clone()) before the stringify call; the
    decoded side already returns JsonValue so it remained compatible.

golden_workflow_execution.rs
  - WorkflowExecutionResult / WorkflowStartResult moved from
    frankenterm_core::workflows::runner to the workflows module root
    (re-exported). Switch the use-decl to the new canonical path so
    the golden compiles cleanly after the workflows module reorg.

No behavior change. Pure build-fix to track upstream API surface.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
